whenToUse.summary: A 'take-away' sale where the prospect must APPLY to work with you. Used for high-ticket coaching, consulting, and any offer requiring a qualification phone call. Credibility video > qualification application > homework/booking, with the sale closed by phone using a setter-then-closer script.
goals: Set up a setter-to-closer phone close
signals: Offer is priced high enough to require a call
You want prospects to sell themselves through the form
doNotUseWhen: Offer is low-ticket / self-serve (use Lead Magnet/SLO/Tripwire)
You have no capacity to take sales calls

pageStructure.purpose: Establish authority and desire, then 'take away' by requiring an application (no price shown).
Qualify the prospect and get them to sell themselves.
blocks: Multi-field qualification form (situation, goals, ability/budget, 'why you')

pageStructure.purpose: Bond with the prospect and book the call.

copyFramework.script: Page-1 VSL = a condensed Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + proof + take-away CTA). Credibility story uses Star/Story/Solution. The call uses a setter-then-closer phone script.
copyFramework.notes: The take-away (you must qualify) raises perceived value and inverts the chase. Form questions make prospects articulate their own desire before the closer ever calls.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Expert Guide
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: Epiphany Bridge Script (Backstory > Journey > New Opportunity > Framework > Achievement > Transformation)
Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + 3 Secrets + The Stack + Close)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Belief-shifting storytelling; transfer your conviction in the vehicle to the prospect.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

skill44Widgets: Multi-field Application Form widget (qualification questions) on page 2
automations: Create an Opportunity in the sales pipeline
ghlBuild.notes: Gate the calendar behind a passing application (conditional). Push qualified applications into the sales pipeline at the correct stage.
